name: studio.delete_blog_tag
description: Delete a blog tag from an Actium Studio site. Posts tagged with this tag are unassigned from it but not deleted.
whenToUse: Tag-cloud cleanup: remove a stale tag after content migration.
Dedup flow: a newer, better-named tag replaces an old one; remove the old entry after posts are re-tagged.
Typo correction: an earlier create_blog_tag used a misspelled name that's now being replaced.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants to untag a single post — that's update_post; this deletes the tag entity itself.
Tag still has many active posts and removing it harms discoverability — re-tag the posts first.
Caller wants to delete a category — use studio.delete_blog_category; category and tag endpoints are separate.
